decision: Pass for personal OneDrive beta; Warn for broad tenant rollout
summary: All discovered and reproduced defects from this beta run were fixed or turned into explicit safe behavior.
Official mocked Microsoft Graph suite passes on Node 26 and Node 20: 108 checks, 0 failures.
Independent fixed-hash verifier passes: 10/10 adversarial categories, 0 failures, no residue.
Installed-build live personal OneDrive beta passed 75/75 with temporary folder cleanup confirmed.
Installed-build read-only tenant matrix passed for common, consumers, and organizations.
Broad tenant rollout remains Warn because full work/school Microsoft 365 CRUD was not available in this account.

fixes.summary: Canonical-first search, adaptive normal find stop, exhaustive find_all, batched search cache writes, and actual Graph search page accounting.
Compact atomic writes, process/interprocess locks, generation-aware reloads, and cache version 3 cursor migration.
Delta-origin scoped cursor persistence, parent-ID hydration for pathless records, and unresolved path reporting.
cTag/eTag handling preserves metadata-only renames and invalidates conservatively when content freshness is uncertain.
Concurrent downloads, exports, update checkouts, backups, and audit exports reserve unique paths or fail safely without clobbering.
Per-tool request IDs, failed-call localWarnings, audit locking, and device-login supersession are isolated under concurrency.
Bounded cleanup, timestamp-safe stale handling, strict CLI flag parsing, benchmark error exits, and installed-cache guard validation.

gates.name: installed drift
gates.evidence: source vs installed cache 0.1.0+codex.20260709154653, 24 files checked

gates.name: independent verifier
gates.evidence: 10/10 adversarial categories; hashes stable; no residue

gates.name: negative CLI guards
gates.evidence: invalid stale days, cleanup page size, retry attempts, booleans, and installed-cache paths rejected

gates.name: installed benchmark smoke
gates.evidence: read-only benchmark completed; cache/index writes stayed local

independent_verifier_coverage: atomic JSON visibility under concurrent reads
same-name download/export reservation and checkout collision refusal
root and scoped delta hydration with no cursor poisoning
cTag rename reuse and omitted-cTag invalidation
exhaustive find_all term execution and paginated search-call accounting
failed mutation localWarnings, concurrent request-ID isolation, and device-login supersession
residual_risks: Microsoft Graph batch live operations remain non-atomic by design; the plugin preflights, warns, and reports partial-state failures.
Full live CRUD was verified only against the available personal OneDrive account. Work/school tenant CRUD should be rerun before broad release.
Pattern-based redaction may need future expansion for new provider error shapes.

install_result.local_test_residue: cleaned from source and installed cache
